title: Create many items at the same time in One board by automation
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am searching a way to create many items at the same time in One board by automation trigger. I intended to have one columns with number and the number of items will be created using numer in that column, can it be…

posts.author: khoanghuy79 (Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am searching a way to create many items at the same time in One board by automation trigger. I intended to have one columns with number and the number of items will be created using numer in that column, can it be possible? I searched it around but it seems I cannot.

Is there any way? thanks guys!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@khoanghuy79

Yes.

One way you could potentially use a custom automation recipe:

posts.author: khoanghuy79 (Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jim,

Thanks for your response but number of items creating depends on the number in the specific column when end users select. your suggestion is basd on a fixed number of items that will be created while mine is dynamic number.

is there any way to help?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@khoanghuy79

Depending on the range of your number, you could consider creating multiple automations of this form:

image932×754 43 KB

Another way that would definitely work would be to create a custom process using Make/Integromat.
